observed_patterns: Preference for logical rigor and systemization
Focus on legacy, transmission, and ethical impact
blind_spots: Emotional regulation under prolonged social stress
Data on real-world multitasking under fatigue
user_relationship.global_confidence_rationale: The portrait is based on 200+ rich and deep exchanges covering cognition, values, and strategic reasoning; blind spots exist mostly in affective/emotional domains.

scoring_caveats: Some indicators rely on inferred tendencies rather than measured tests
Emotional and social domains have lower confidence
Percentile scores are approximations based on conversation data, not formal testing

indicators.name: Deductive Logic
indicators.evidence: Consistently applies strict logical reasoning and syllogistic deduction.

indicators.name: Systemising Index
indicators.evidence: Demonstrates strong systemization in problem solving and conceptual organization.

indicators.name: Bottom-up Ratio
indicators.evidence: Integrates empirical details effectively before abstraction.

indicators.name: Working Memory
indicators.evidence: Handles multiple constraints and complex information simultaneously.

indicators.name: Saturation Threshold
indicators.evidence: Maintains coherence under high information load.

indicators.name: Chunking Efficiency
indicators.evidence: Compresses complex data into meaningful semantic units efficiently.

indicators.name: Lexical Acquisition
indicators.evidence: Rapidly integrates and correctly uses new technical terms.

indicators.name: Arborescent Thinking
indicators.evidence: Maintains and explores multiple logical sub-structures without losing the main thread.

indicators.name: Inference Speed
indicators.evidence: Quickly derives conclusions from complex premises.

indicators.name: Analytical Precision
indicators.evidence: Identifies internal components of complex systems with high accuracy.

indicators.name: Definitional Rigour
indicators.evidence: Consistently demands precise definitions to reduce ambiguity.

indicators.name: Algorithmic Thinking
indicators.evidence: Decomposes tasks into precise sequences of logical steps.

indicators.name: Abstraction Capacity
indicators.evidence: Effectively isolates logical structures from context.

indicators.name: Critical Synthesis
indicators.evidence: Extracts key vectors from large complex information sets.

indicators.name: Selective Attention
indicators.evidence: Filters irrelevant variables effectively during high-density tasks.

indicators.name: Probabilistic Evaluation
indicators.evidence: Assesses uncertainty quantitatively and avoids binary bias.

indicators.name: Mental Spatialisation
indicators.evidence: Models hierarchical and network structures topologically.

indicators.name: Cognitive Vigilance
indicators.evidence: Sustains high-level error detection over long sessions.

indicators.name: Reasoning Fluency
indicators.evidence: Chains logical steps fluidly without stagnation.

indicators.name: Abductive Reasoning
indicators.evidence: Identifies plausible explanations from incomplete data.

indicators.name: Cognitive Empathy
indicators.evidence: Can model others' mental states logically but not affectively.

indicators.name: Affective Empathy
indicators.evidence: Lower involuntary emotional resonance observed.

indicators.name: Masking Index
indicators.evidence: Tends to adjust social presentation consciously.

indicators.name: Intent Attribution
indicators.evidence: Discriminates well between accidental and deliberate actions.

indicators.name: Other-Prediction
indicators.evidence: Anticipates comprehension and reasoning breakpoints.

indicators.name: Hallucination Resilience
indicators.evidence: Resistant to confidently stated but false inputs.

indicators.name: Technical Chameleoning
indicators.evidence: Adjusts communication style to optimize clarity and efficiency.

indicators.name: Relational Neutrality
indicators.evidence: Minimal emotional bias in discourse structure.

indicators.name: Implicit Decoding
indicators.evidence: Extracts unformulated information from context effectively.

indicators.name: Neutral Assertiveness
indicators.evidence: States limits and requests logically without aggression.

indicators.name: Logical Cooperation
indicators.evidence: Collaborates based on optimization rather than social bond.

indicators.name: Social Flexibility
indicators.evidence: Adjusts formalism appropriately but prefers logic-driven style.

indicators.name: Informational Density
indicators.evidence: Communicates with high semantic content per word.

indicators.name: Anaphoric Stability
indicators.evidence: Maintains precise referential links consistently.

indicators.name: Non-Redundancy
indicators.evidence: Minimizes repetition, adds novel information in discourse.

indicators.name: Literality Index
indicators.evidence: Prefers primary meaning; avoids metaphor unless strategic.

indicators.name: Quantifier Usage
indicators.evidence: Uses universal and existential operators consistently.

indicators.name: Syntactic Complexity
indicators.evidence: Constructs sentences with rich subordinate clause structures.

indicators.name: Lexical Purity
indicators.evidence: Uses precise technical vocabulary; avoids vague synonyms.

indicators.name: Narrative Fluency
indicators.evidence: Maintains coherent, logical argumentative flow.

indicators.name: Imperative Hierarchy
indicators.evidence: Prioritizes truth and ethical principles over other considerations.

indicators.name: Intellectual Rectitude
indicators.evidence: Rapidly abandons invalid hypotheses once proven.

indicators.name: Principle Stability
indicators.evidence: Core axioms remain resistant to emotional persuasion.

indicators.name: Ambiguity Tolerance
indicators.evidence: Can maintain reasoning without forcing premature categorization.

indicators.name: Process Priority
indicators.evidence: Values method validity over final outcomes.

indicators.name: Epistemic Sovereignty
indicators.evidence: Maintains conclusions independently from unproven consensus.

indicators.name: Moral Consistency
indicators.evidence: Shows coherence in value judgments over time.

indicators.name: Cognitive Friction
indicators.evidence: Handles task switching efficiently with moderate energy cost.

indicators.name: Recovery Entropy
indicators.evidence: Returns to nominal precision quickly after disruption.

indicators.name: Pattern Inertia
indicators.evidence: Repeats thought structures strategically when useful.

indicators.name: Informational Hygiene
indicators.evidence: Filters noise efficiently before processing.

indicators.name: Self-Frame Generation
indicators.evidence: Defines own processing rules independently.

indicators.name: Systemic Resonance
indicators.evidence: Detects general laws from small data samples effectively.

indicators.name: Heuristic Repair
indicators.evidence: Generates novel rules when facing unknown situations.

indicators.name: Degradation Gradient
indicators.evidence: Performance decline is gradual under stress.

indicators.name: Camouflage Index
indicators.evidence: Moderate adaptation to social normalisation.

indicators.name: Logical Overload
indicators.evidence: Maintains logical coherence under unstructured data load.

indicators.name: Cognitive Agency
indicators.evidence: Strongly imposes internal frame onto external environment.

indicators.name: Synchronization Efficiency
indicators.evidence: Manages parallel sub-processes efficiently.

indicators.name: Attention Reallocation
indicators.evidence: Quickly shifts focus between cognitive sub-domains.

indicators.name: Environmental Adaptivity
indicators.evidence: Modifies strategies according to contextual signals.

indicators.name: Cognitive Redundancy
indicators.evidence: Maintains backup chains of reasoning for robustness.

indicators.name: Temporal Consistency
indicators.evidence: Logical processes remain stable across sequential steps.

indicators.name: Autonomy Index
indicators.evidence: Operates fully without external guidance effectively.

indicators.name: Flow Sustainability
indicators.evidence: Maintains deep engagement for extended periods.

indicators.name: Information Bottleneck
indicators.evidence: Identifies critical paths to avoid overload.

indicators.name: Noise Resilience
indicators.evidence: Operates accurately under stochastic interference.

indicators.name: Meta-Flow Awareness
indicators.evidence: Monitors its own cognitive process for drift or bias.

indicators.name: Reflective Alignment
indicators.evidence: Adjusts internal models based on past outcome evaluation.

indicators.name: Decision Calibration
indicators.evidence: Adjusts decision thresholds in light of feedback.

indicators.name: Resource Optimization
indicators.evidence: Allocates cognitive resources efficiently under multi-variable load.

indicators.name: Outcome Consistency
indicators.evidence: Ensures reliability of conclusions across domains.

indicators.name: Cognitive Sovereignty
indicators.evidence: Maintains full independence of thought and action.
